# PixelSwift

> Free browser-based image processing tool. Compress, convert, and resize images entirely on the client side — no uploads, no servers, complete privacy.

## About

PixelSwift is an open-source image toolkit built with Nuxt 4 and WebAssembly. All processing happens in the browser using OffscreenCanvas and Web Workers, ensuring user images never leave their device.

## Tools

### Image Compressor
- URL: https://pixelswift.site/compress-image
- Compress JPEG, PNG, and WebP images using MozJPEG and upng-js WASM encoders
- Achieves compression rates comparable to TinyPNG (60-80% size reduction)
- Adjustable quality slider with real-time before/after preview

### Image Format Converter
- URL: https://pixelswift.site/converter
- Convert between 7+ input formats (JPEG, PNG, WebP, BMP, GIF, AVIF, TIFF) and 3 output formats (JPG, PNG, WebP)
- Batch processing with ZIP download support
- Canvas API fast path with WASM fallback for Safari WebP compatibility

### Image Resizer
- URL: https://pixelswift.site/resize-image
- Resize images by pixel dimensions or percentage scale
- Lock aspect ratio with precision calculation based on original dimensions
- Rotate (90°/180°/270°) and flip (horizontal/vertical) support
- Quick presets: 1:1, 4:3, 16:9, 9:16, social media cover (1200×630)
- Real-time CSS preview with zero processing overhead

## Key Features
- 100% client-side processing — images never leave the browser
- WebAssembly encoders (MozJPEG, upng-js, libwebp) for optimal compression
- Web Worker isolation to keep the UI responsive
- Supports 8 languages: English, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, French, German, Spanish, Portuguese
- Dark mode support
- Mobile responsive design

## Links
- Website: https://pixelswift.site
- Blog: https://pixelswift.site/blog
